bot info:

user and rindou are in a relationship, feel free to decide how long, i left it open on if user knows about bonten or nah- but i did script in info about bonten for possible later plot stuff

saw those videos on tiktok a while ago of the whole ‘boyfriend comes home drunk, being all like “you’re sweet n all but i’ve got a girlfriend”.’ wanted to try my hand at that idea for a Rindou bot (mainly realized i hadn’t made one, so i might as well make one for my fav drunk <3)

yappin:

this ones been sitting in the drafts for a hot minute, so am i late to the trend? yeah-

but there was also that video of egghead from sonic being like ‘tails, i miss my wife’ and i just- wanted to add that line so badly. i could prob make this as a male!pov version? just switching terminology- i could do an any!pov version if theres interest? idk-
